educational_objective: Support bedtime with short books that repeat familiar wind-down steps.
age_stage_nuance: Just past two, bedtime needs predictable steps they can join: bath, story, lights, sleep. Short familiar pages beat long new plots at the end of the day.
what_to_look_for: Short pages, repeated bedtime steps, age overlap 18-48m, UK publisher primary.
what_to_avoid: Interest age from 3+ only, long chapter-like plots, Amazon-only primaries.
methodology: Bench of UK bedtime board and picture books on Penguin and Bookshop; discarded interest-from-3 and 403 hosts; ranked by familiar wind-down steps for this band, brand cap two, and buyability; URL-verified 2026-07-24.
buying_factor_memo: Familiar steps first (ten minutes, goodnight round, going to bed sequence). Then love-you closers. Brand cap two per author. High ownership risk on UK staples. Specialist ratings path after Amazon bot walls.

top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (Ten Minutes to Bed: Little Unicorn). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.product_name: Ten Minutes to Bed: Little Unicorn
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A countdown bedtime story with familiar wind down steps and a little unicorn racing the clock toward sleep, best when you pause for one last job before lights out.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Just past two, bedtime works better with steps they can join than a brand new plot. Count the minutes, pause for one last job, then close. Start here when you want a short wind down they already recognise from last night.

top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if Unicorn edition is not yet loved.
top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (Ten Minutes to Bed: Little Dinosaur). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.product_name: Ten Minutes to Bed: Little Dinosaur
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: The same ten minute bedtime countdown with a little dinosaur, so the familiar steps stay while the character swaps for a fresh read.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Once the unicorn countdown is known, a dinosaur swap keeps the same steps without inventing a new routine. Count the minutes, pause for one last job, then close. Second Fielding only when Little Unicorn is already the house wind down.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #2: same countdown pattern; second Fielding slot.

top_picks.ownership_note: Very high duplication risk; borrow first.
top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (Goodnight Moon). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A classic goodnight round that names the room and says goodnight to each thing before sleep, paced for shared pointing on tired nights.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Just past two, a predictable goodnight round settles the room better than a surprise ending. Name each thing, wait for a point, then close. Keep this when the countdown books get too busy after a long day at home tonight.

top_picks.ownership_note: High duplication risk; ask before buying.
top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (Guess How Much I Love You). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.age_mark_on_listing: Toddler to early years; overlaps this band
top_picks.product_name: Guess How Much I Love You
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A short love you back and forth between Big Nutbrown Hare and Little Nutbrown Hare before sleep, ending in a soft closer.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Some nights need a love you closer more than a countdown. Trade one bigger love you, wait for a lean in, then lights out. Soft close when the countdown books already covered the wind down steps tonight at home together.

top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (Goodnight Gorilla). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.age_mark_on_listing: Toddler picture book; overlaps this band
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A nearly wordless goodnight zoo story where animals tip toe after the zookeeper toward bed, one stop at a time.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Just past two, a quiet goodnight chase can still work as a routine if you name each stop. Point, whisper goodnight, then turn. Useful when they want a gentle giggle without a long spoken plot before sleep tonight at home.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #5: quiet goodnight sequence; Peggy Rathmann first slot.

top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (The Going to Bed Book). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.

age_signals.raw_text: Baby/toddler bedtime board book overlapping 0-48 months

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A short board book that walks animals through bath, brush and bed in a clear going to bed sequence you can mime together.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Bedtime just past two needs steps they can copy: bath, brush, bed. Read one step, wait for a mime, then turn. Good when countdown stories are already known and you want a plainer sequence on the sofa tonight together at home.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #6: plain going to bed sequence; Boynton first slot.

top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (Time for Bed). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A gentle animal bedtime book with short lines that say it is time for bed again and again, paced for shared looking.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Some nights only need the same soft line repeated until they settle. Read one animal page, wait for a yawn cue, then turn. Soft close when the house already did bath and brush without a story fight tonight at home.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #7: repeated time for bed line; Mem Fox first slot.

top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (On the Night You Were Born). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.age_mark_on_listing: Toddler to early years; overlaps this band
top_picks.product_name: On the Night You Were Born
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A lyrical night time story about the night they arrived, ending in a quiet you are loved closer for shared reading.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Some bedtimes want a you are loved closer more than a countdown. Stay on one night page, name the love cue, wait for a lean in, then lights out. Soft close after the familiar wind down steps are already done.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #8: birth night love closer; Nancy Tillman first slot.

top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (Peace at Last). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A house that will not stay quiet while Mr Bear tries to sleep, ending when peace finally arrives after each noise.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Just past two, naming the noises that keep sleep away can settle a restless night. Pause on each noise, wait for a matching sound or a giggle, then turn toward quiet. Useful after a loud day when silence needs a story frame.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #9: noisy house to quiet; Jill Murphy first slot.

top_picks.evidence_notes: UK publisher/Bookshop PDP smoke-OK and buyable 2026-07-24 (Can't You Sleep, Little Bear?). Amazon bot-walled in-agent; specialist exemption with long UK shelf presence.
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A cave bedtime story where Big Bear helps Little Bear with the dark until sleep finally comes, page by page.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Fear of the dark often lands just past two. Stay with Big Bear as the light gets bigger, wait for a nod, then close. Soft close when the countdown books already handled the wind down and only the dark worry remains.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #10: dark worry with a helper; Martin Waddell first slot.

skips.skip_reason: Interest age from 3 years does not overlap 25-27 months.
Walker 403 to agents; Bookshop primary used instead.
Bookshop 403 in-agent; not used as primary.

guidance_notes.title: Borrow first
guidance_notes.body: Goodnight Moon and Guess How Much I Love You turn up in many UK homes; ask before buying new.
